issues.message: JSON.stringify used for object comparison on every feature during diff computation — allocates two serialized strings per comparison
issues.suggestion: Replace with a lightweight structural equality helper (Object.keys iteration or fast-deep-equal)
issues.evidence: if (JSON.stringify(prev.meta) \!== JSON.stringify(curr.meta)) { changes["meta"] = { from: prev.meta, to: curr.meta }; }

issues.message: extractSection compiles a new RegExp on every call — invoked 3-4 times per document parse
issues.suggestion: Memoize compiled regexes keyed on sectionName, or parse all sections in a single linear pass
issues.evidence: const escaped = escapeRegex(sectionName); const regex = new RegExp(`^##\\s+${escaped}\\s*$`, "m");

issues.message: Array.filter inside per-feature loop creates throwaway intermediate array to count completed tasks
issues.suggestion: Use a manual counter or reduce to avoid allocating a temporary array

issues.message: Array.sort called on task numbers even though tasks are typically already sequential — unnecessary O(n log n)
issues.suggestion: Replace with a single O(n) sequential pass that tracks the expected next number
issues.evidence: const numbers = feature.tasks.map((t) => t.number).sort((a, b) => a - b);
